---
title: "Juncheng Zhang"
description-meta: "Juncheng Zhang, PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Nottingham Ningbo China"
image: "files/images/image.png"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  template: jolla
  image: files/images/image.png
---

:::{#hero-heading}

## Hi there!
I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at the [University of Nottingham Ningbo China](https://www.nottingham.edu.cn/) and a member of [CeDEx China](https://cedex-china.github.io/). I received my Master’s degree from [University of Southampton](https://www.southampton.ac.uk/) and my Bachelor’s degree from Jilin University, Zhuhai College.

My research interests are in experimental and behavioural economics, especially how people's self-perception shapes decision-making.

:::
